moments.title: The Open Championship Wrap-Up
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship concluded on Sunday at Royal Birkdale, with New Zealand's Ryan Fox claiming a memorable victory.

angles.name: Winner's Glory
angles.copy: Ryan Fox, Champion Golfer of the Year! What a performance at Royal Birkdale to clinch The 154th Open. Relive the best moments.

angles.name: Royal Birkdale Review
angles.copy: The Claret Jug has been lifted! Royal Birkdale delivered a classic Open Championship. What was your standout shot or moment from the weekend?

moments.title: Commonwealth Games Glasgow 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The 2026 Commonwealth Games, officially known as Glasgow 2026, is set to begin on Thursday, July 23, in Glasgow, Scotland, running until August 2.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Glasgow, get ready! The Commonwealth Games 2026 officially opens on Thursday. Who are you most excited to cheer on?

angles.name: Team UK Hopes
angles.copy: The countdown is on for Glasgow 2026! Our athletes are primed for glory. What events are you most looking forward to watching?

moments.title: Premier League Pre-Season Friendlies Underway
moments.blurb: Premier League clubs are deep into their pre-season preparations, with Aston Villa facing Walsall today (July 21) and Manchester United playing Rosenborg on Friday, July 24.

angles.name: Pre-Season Action
angles.copy: It's pre-season action today! Aston Villa take on Walsall. Who are you backing for a strong start to the new campaign?

angles.name: United's Nordic Trip
angles.copy: Man Utd head to Norway this week to face Rosenborg on Friday. How are your team's pre-season preparations looking?

moments.title: Love Island UK 2026 Final Approaches
moments.blurb: The highly anticipated Love Island UK 2026 final is confirmed to air on Monday, July 27, at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Who Will Win?
angles.copy: The Love Island final is just days away! Who's your favourite couple to take home the £50k and be crowned the winners?

angles.name: Drama Recap
angles.copy: After weeks of romance, drama, and unexpected twists, the Love Island villa is about to close its doors. What's been your favourite moment?

moments.title: Paul Weller Turns 68
moments.blurb: The Modfather himself, Paul Weller, known for The Jam, The Style Council, and his prolific solo career, celebrates his 68th birthday today. He was born on July 21, 1958.

angles.name: Happy Birthday Modfather
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to the legendary Paul Weller! From The Jam to The Style Council and his incredible solo work, what's your favourite Weller track?

angles.name: Weller's Influence
angles.copy: 68 today! Paul Weller's influence on British music is undeniable. Which of his bands or eras resonates most with you?

moments.title: Don Henley Turns 79
moments.blurb: Eagles co-founder, drummer, and vocalist Don Henley, known for hits like 'Hotel California' and 'Boys of Summer,' celebrates his 79th birthday tomorrow, July 22. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we're wishing a very happy 79th birthday to Eagles icon Don Henley! What's your go-to Eagles track featuring Don?

angles.name: Solo Success
angles.copy: Before his 79th birthday tomorrow, let's celebrate Don Henley's incredible solo career. 'Boys of Summer' or 'Dirty Laundry'?

moments.title: George Clinton Turns 85
moments.blurb: The legendary 'Godfather of Funk,' George Clinton of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday tomorrow, July 22. He was born in 1941.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Get up for the downstroke! Wishing a massive happy 85th birthday to the one and only George Clinton tomorrow! Funkadelic forever!

angles.name: P-Funk Legacy
angles.copy: From Parliament to Funkadelic, George Clinton shaped an entire genre. Celebrating his 85th tomorrow, what's your favourite P-Funk anthem?

moments.title: Slash Turns 61
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses' iconic top-hatted guitarist, Slash, celebrates his 61st birthday on Thursday, July 23. He was born in 1965.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: That legendary riff! Wishing a rock 'n' roll happy 61st birthday to the incredible Slash on Thursday. What's his ultimate guitar solo?

angles.name: GNR Anthems
angles.copy: From 'Sweet Child o' Mine' to 'November Rain,' Slash's guitar work is instantly recognisable. Celebrating his 61st this Thursday!

moments.title: Jennifer Lopez Turns 57
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez, known for her chart-topping music, acting, and incredible stage presence, celebrates her 57th birthday on Friday, July 24. She was born in 1969.

angles.name: JLo's Reign
angles.copy: From the block to global superstardom! Wishing a fabulous 57th birthday to the one and only J.Lo this Friday. What's your favourite J.Lo hit?

angles.name: Dance Floor Queen
angles.copy: Get ready to dance as we celebrate Jennifer Lopez's 57th birthday this Friday! Which of her tracks gets you moving every time?

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Sunday, July 26. He was born in 1943.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Royalty
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Wishing an incredible 83rd birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger this Sunday. What's your favourite Stones anthem?

angles.name: Timeless Performer
angles.copy: 83 years young! Mick Jagger's energy is unmatched. Celebrate his birthday this Sunday with your top Rolling Stones track!

moments.title: Roger Taylor Turns 77
moments.blurb: Queen's powerhouse drummer and songwriter, Roger Taylor, celebrates his 77th birthday on Sunday, July 26. He was born in 1949.

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Keep yourself alive! Happy 77th birthday to Queen's drumming maestro, Roger Taylor, this Sunday. What's your favourite Queen track he wrote?

angles.name: Queen's Beat
angles.copy: Celebrating Roger Taylor's 77th birthday this Sunday! His beats are the backbone of so many Queen classics. Which one stands out for you?

moments.title: Geddy Lee Turns 73
moments.blurb: Rush's iconic bassist, vocalist, and keyboardist, Geddy Lee, celebrates his 73rd birthday on Wednesday, July 29. He was born in 1953.

angles.name: Rush Legend
angles.copy: A true progressive rock titan! Wishing a very happy 73rd birthday to Rush's Geddy Lee this Wednesday. What's your favourite Rush epic?

angles.name: Bass Master
angles.copy: Celebrating Geddy Lee's 73rd this Wednesday! His unique voice and intricate bass lines defined an era. What's your top Rush album?

moments.title: Arnold Schwarzenegger Turns 79
moments.blurb: Actor, bodybuilder, and former Governor of California, Arnold Schwarzenegger, celebrates his 79th birthday on Thursday, July 30. He was born in 1947.

angles.name: Action Hero Icon
angles.copy: Get to the chopper! Wishing a massive happy 79th birthday to the one and only Arnold Schwarzenegger this Thursday. What's your favourite Arnie movie line?

angles.name: Cultural Phenomenon
angles.copy: From bodybuilding legend to action star to politician – Arnold Schwarzenegger is 79 this Thursday! What's his most iconic role?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is updated regularly, reflecting the nation's most popular tracks and new entries.

angles.name: Chart Toppers
angles.copy: What's topping the Official UK Singles Chart today? Tune in to hear the biggest hits and latest movers!

angles.name: New Entries
angles.copy: Any new entries shaking up the Official UK Singles Chart this week? Discover the tracks everyone's talking about!
